summary: This is a Protocol Deviation Log (eTMF-003) for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, version 4, dated 01 December 2023. It tracks six protocol deviations across multiple European sites (Spain, France, Germany, Italy, Netherlands), categorizing each by type, severity, patient impact, corrective action, and status, with five closed and one open deviation.
